module.description: Reusable media library plus dynamic metadata field definitions for business entities.
module.library_permission_description: Upload, edit, export and delete reusable media assets.
module.metadata_permission_description: Define dynamic metadata fields for media resources.

index.title: Media Metadata Fields
index.description: Declarative definitions of reusable dynamic fields by resource.

empty.title: No metadata fields yet
empty.description: Create the first metadata field to extend the media library without touching hard-coded forms.

actions.confirm_delete: Delete field "%s"? Existing metadata values for that field will also be removed.

index.search_placeholder: Search by label, key or help text

form.hero_lede: Define the reusable contract for dynamic fields consumed later by FormBuilder, DataGrid, validation, and shared persistence.

placeholders.help_text: Shown below the field in the privileged form.
placeholders.placeholder: Visible hint for inputs that support it.
placeholders.default_value: Optional default for the host form.

help.field_key: Unique key per resource. It is used for binding, validation and reusable persistence.
help.catalog: Governed catalog for reusable options with lifecycle and validity.
help.section_key: Optional. Groups dynamic fields in form sections.
help.required: Require a value when the host form is submitted.
help.listed: Expose this field as an extra column in resource listings.
help.filterable: Expose this field as a reusable DataGrid filter when supported.
help.extra_rules: Additional rules over the current validator. They are appended to the base type contract.
help.select_options: One option per line. Use "value | label" or just "value".

identity.title: Field identity
identity.description: Target resource, declarative key and base type of the dynamic field.

behavior.title: Behavior
behavior.description: UI rules, filters, listings and additional validation.

type_configuration.title: Type configuration
type_configuration.description: Options and limits that change according to the field type.

index.title: Media Library
index.description: Reusable asset library over the framework's real storage and dynamic metadata per entity.
index.hero_lede: Reusable file library with native metadata, real storage and declarative extension through dynamic fields.

empty.title: No media assets yet
empty.description: Upload the first reusable asset to start composing dynamic metadata and shared references.

bulk.select_one: Select at least one media asset.

index.search_placeholder: Search by label, original name, path or mime type

form.hero_lede_create: Reusable registration of files and media over the current upload and storage stack.
form.hero_lede_edit: Update the real asset and its dynamic metadata without leaving the privileged flow.

help.disk: The upload uses the active storage abstraction. FTP/SFTP only appears when remote configuration is ready.
help.asset_file_create: Upload the real file that will be registered in the media library.
help.asset_file_edit: Leave empty to keep the current file.

asset_file.title: Asset source
asset_file.description: Real file, storage disk and native metadata of the asset.

asset_context.title: Operational context
asset_context.description: Visible asset name and reusable extension inside the framework.

validation.remote_storage_not_ready: Remote FTP/SFTP storage is not configured yet.
